originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Fixing Memory Leaks and Integrating Constellation for PufferLib Sweeps
summary: Worked on cleaning up environment shutdown and memory leaks in PufferLib, particularly with CUDA graphs and cuBLAS workspace. Integrated the constellation visualizer for hyperparameter sweeps and fixed BF16 numerical stability by correcting a custom kernel issue, achieving stable sweeps and pre-alpha readiness.
